name: OneMain Financial
description_short: OneMain Financial offers personal loans from $1,500–$30,000 with fixed rates (11.99%–35.99% APR) and same-day funding. They provide secured and unsecured options with no prepayment penalties.
description_long:
OneMain Financial has served customers for over 100 years, positioning itself as an established lender in the personal loan market. The company operates physical branch locations, including the W Flagler St branch in Miami, Florida, alongside online and phone-based application channels. This omnichannel approach reflects their commitment to accessibility across different customer preferences and schedules.

The company offers personal loans ranging from $1,500 to $30,000 with loan terms between 24–60 months. Interest rates are fixed, ranging from 11.99% to 35.99% APR depending on creditworthiness and loan structure. They provide both secured and unsecured personal loan options, allowing customers to choose based on their circumstances. Approved borrowers can access funds as quickly as 1 hour after closing through their SpeedFunds feature using eligible bank-issued debit cards. The platform explicitly states no prepayment penalties, providing flexibility for early repayment.

OneMain distinguishes itself through personalized service: they offer after-hours appointments to accommodate working schedules, one-on-one consultation with loan specialists, and a prequalification process that does not affect credit scores. Their marketing emphasizes transparency with fixed monthly payments, making budgeting predictable. The company supports diverse loan purposes including debt consolidation, auto purchases and refinances, medical bills, home improvement, emergency expenses, and lifestyle goals (vacations, weddings, pools, motorcycles, RVs, boats, funerals).

However, the interest rate range of 11.99%–35.99% APR is notably high, particularly the upper threshold, which exceeds rates available through traditional banks and even some alternative lenders. The minimum loan amount of $1,500 excludes consumers needing smaller emergency loans. While they market accessibility, approval depends on individual credit profiles and financial circumstances, and the actual rates offered vary significantly within their stated range.

As a financial institution, this lender competes with both traditional banks and newer fintech personal loan lenders in the consumer lending space. Borrowers seeking personal loans for bad credit may find more flexible terms through online lenders, while those focused on simplifying payments may benefit from debt consolidation loans with fixed rates. For credit building, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured paths to improvement. Credit monitoring services provide ongoing visibility into credit health, and credit counseling through nonprofit agencies can help consumers create sustainable budgeting plans. Many of these lenders offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments over 12 to 60 months, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
address: 9732 SE Washington St Suite K, Portland, OR 97216

company_info.headquarters: 9732 SE Washington St Suite K, Portland, OR 97216

pros: Funds available in as little as 1 hour after closing with SpeedFunds feature using eligible debit cards
Fixed interest rates and fixed monthly payments with no prepayment penalties—no surprise fees for early repayment
Loan amounts from $1,500–$30,000 with flexible terms from 24–60 months to match various budgeting needs
Prequalification process available online, by phone, or in-branch without affecting credit score
After-hours appointments available to accommodate working schedules beyond traditional business hours
100+ year operating history providing established credibility and customer service infrastructure
Multiple application channels: online, phone with loan specialists, or in-person at physical branch locations
cons: Interest rates up to 35.99% APR are significantly higher than traditional bank personal loans and many credit union alternatives
Minimum loan amount of $1,500 excludes consumers needing small emergency loans under $1,500
Loan approval and actual rates vary by individual creditworthiness, and higher APR rates typically apply to customers with lower credit scores
Limited same-day funding availability—SpeedFunds requires eligible bank-issued debit card and only applies post-closing
No information provided on credit score requirements, debt-to-income limits, or approval odds, making qualification assessment difficult
best_for: Customers needing debt consolidation with predictable fixed monthly payments and no prepayment penalties
Borrowers seeking fast funding (within 1 hour) for emergency expenses or time-sensitive purchases
Working professionals who need flexible scheduling and prefer one-on-one consultation with loan specialists
Mid-credit borrowers unable to qualify for traditional bank loans but seeking established lender infrastructure
diagnosis: OneMain Financial is best for borrowers who need quick access to funds ($1,500+) with fixed payments and no prepayment penalties, and who value in-person service and established credibility. The main caveat is the high interest rate range (particularly 35.99% APR ceiling), which makes this option expensive compared to traditional banks and should be carefully evaluated against alternative lenders before committing.
services: Auto purchase and auto refinance loans
Specialty loans (wedding, vacation, motorcycle, RV, boat, funeral, pool)
Same-day funding via SpeedFunds (with eligible debit card)
In-branch closing and one-on-one loan specialist consultation
